description: Every PostHog resource in one CLI — with offline search, agent-native output, and cross-resource analytics no dashboard exposes.

tools.name: posthog_search
tools.description: Search PostHog resources — feature flags, experiments, dashboards, insights, persons, cohorts, surveys — by keyword or property. Returns matching records from local cache or live API.

params.name: resource
params.description: Resource type to search (e.g. feature_flags, experiments, persons)

tools.name: posthog_execute
tools.description: Execute any posthog-pp-cli command and return structured JSON output. Supports the full command surface including novel compound analytics: flags blast-radius, flags rollout-health, llm cost-attribution, persons at-risk, events property-drift, experiments pre-check, flags stale, dashboard health.

params.name: command
params.description: Full CLI command to execute (e.g. 'flags blast-radius --key my-flag --json')
